description_long: This object is a stylized doll face mask with dramatic, theatrical makeup reminiscent of traditional Asian opera or kabuki masks. The face is painted with bold black, red, and brown lines that accentuate the eyes, eyebrows, and lips, creating a striking and expressive appearance. The mask features a smooth, pale complexion with high-arched eyebrows, elongated eye shapes, and vividly red lips. The contours of the face are well-defined, with a prominent nose and softly rounded cheeks. The paintwork is glossy and appears to be applied with precision, giving the mask a polished, decorative look. The mask is hollow and thin, suggesting it is lightweight and intended for display or costume use.
description: A stylized doll face mask with bold black, red, and brown theatrical makeup, smooth pale surface, and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, with dramatic red lips, black and red eye makeup, and high-arched eyebrows.
description_view_1: Left-angled view highlighting the cheek contour, side of the nose, and the sweeping black and brown paint details.
description_view_2: Right-angled view emphasizing the curve of the jaw, the side of the lips, and the continuation of the painted patterns.
description_view_3: Profile view focusing on the nose, lips, and the bold black and brown lines along the side of the face.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the object is a face mask with painted theatrical makeup in black, red, and brown patterns.
attribute_pose: The object depicts only a face with no visible body, limbs, or torso; the facial features are static and forward-facing.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed lips, slightly upturned mouth corners, and painted, arched eyebrows; eyes are closed or painted in a stylized manner.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the mask is bald with painted patterns extending where hair might be.
